prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约19385名→16780名→16600名→17509名→19221名，整体呈"V"型波动：2021–2023年逐年前移（位次数字减小），2024–2025年明显后移（位次数字增大），近两年累计后移约2621名；2025年基准位次约19221名，为近五年第二高位；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2025年连续五年均为15人，2026年仍为15人，招生规模完全持平，无扩招或缩招；在考生总数大幅增长的背景下，计划不变意味着竞争压力相对增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第114–120名区间（2026年约第114名），属于中下游211院校，层次定位清晰；该校近年未出现明显正面或负面声誉事件，抖音综合热度排名第101位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平；历史投档异常记录中未见该校，报考心理层面缺乏额外刺激因素；第五轮学科评估中内蒙古。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业仍为高热推荐方向，法学、汉语言文学等文科专业热度中等偏热；该校招生专业涵盖上述方向，但整体专业吸引力一般；北京市考生总数从2025年65434人大幅增至2026年84900人（增幅约29.7%），竞争基数显著扩大；2026年；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距北京较远，属于跨省就读；该校在北京市招生占比极小（每年仅15人），地域偏好对北京考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平而北京考生总数大幅增长约30%、学校层次与声誉缺乏额外吸引力等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，最低录取位次在2025年基准19221名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约19521名，波动区间19021–20021名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约19521名，区间19021–20021名。位次在区间下限19021名以内可重点冲刺一档专业（法学、数据科学、软件工程）；位次在19521名附近建议以二档专业（电子信息类、金融学、汉语言文学）为主攻方向；位次接近区间上限20021名可考虑三档专业保底。该校招生专业以"不限"选科组为主，选科兼容性较好，但整体专业层次与学科评估数据有限，建议结合个人兴趣与就业规划综合权衡。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 19385 → 16780 → 16600 → 17509 → 19221, showing a 'V'-shaped fluctuation: moving forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (ranking numbers decreasing), then significantly moving backward from 2024 to 2025 (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative backward shift of about 2621 places in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19221, the second highest in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for Beijing's comprehensive category has been consistently 15 students for five consecutive years from 2021 to 2025, and remains 15 students in 2026, with the enrollment scale completely unchanged, no expansion or reduction; against the backdrop of a significant increase in the total number of examinees, the unchanged plan means relatively increased competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 114–120 range in recent years (approximately 114th in 2026), placing it among mid-to-lower tier 211 universities with a clear hierarchical positioning; the university has not experienced any significant positive or negative reputation events in recent years, with a comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking of 101st (rated 'average'), indicating a medium-to-low level of exposure on short video platforms; no historical admission anomalies have been recorded for this university, and there is a lack of additional stimulating factors at the psychological level of application; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended directions, while liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature have medium-to-high popularity; the university's enrollment majors cover the above directions, but overall major appeal is average; the total number of examinees in Beijing increased significantly from 65,434 in 2025 to 84,900 in 2026 (an increase of about 29.7%), substantially expanding the competition base; 2026; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Beijing, and involves cross-province enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is extremely small (only 15 students per year), and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Beijing candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 alongside a significant increase of about 30% in the total number of Beijing examinees, and the lack of additional appeal in the university's level and reputation, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, with the minimum admission ranking continuing to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 19221; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19521, with a fluctuation range of 19021–20021.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 19521, range 19021–20021. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 19021 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Data Science, Software Engineering); those around 19521 are advised to target Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature) as the main direction; candidates near the upper limit of 20021 may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. The university's enrollment majors are mainly in the 'no subject restriction' selection group, with good selection compatibility, but overall major levels and discipline evaluation data are limited; it is recommended to weigh personal interests and career plans comprehensively.
